input: How long does it take to get a refund after returning an item?
expected_output: 5 to 10 business days
context: Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5 to 10 business days after approval

input: Can I return an opened item after 30 days?
expected_output: No, only eligible for store credit
context: After 30 days, opened items are not eligible for a refund, but some orders may qualify for store credit

input: What is the shipping time for standard shipping?
expected_output: 3 to 5 business days
context: Standard shipping takes 3 to 5 business days

input: How long is the warranty for electronics?
expected_output: 1 year
context: Electronics include a 1-year limited warranty

expected_output: Before the order is packed for shipping
context: Cancellations are only possible before the order is packed for shipping

context: Electronics include a 1-year limited warranty.
Physical damage, liquid damage, and unauthorized repairs are not covered.

expected_output: No, gift cards cannot be combined with subscription purchases
context: Only one promo code can be used per order.
